overview.description: Recurring reflection and planning surfaces. Each ritual has its own page with history and AI summary.

dailyPlan.title: Daily Plan
dailyPlan.description: Plan your day before you start.

dailyShutdown.title: Daily Shutdown
dailyShutdown.description: Close out the day, capture wins and tomorrow.

weeklyPlan.title: Weekly Plan
weeklyPlan.description: Set objectives for the week ahead.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly Review
weeklyReview.description: Reflect on the week, learn, and reset.

quarterly.title: Quarterly Review
quarterly.description: Long-horizon check on goals and direction.

annual.title: Annual Review
annual.description: Year in review and intentions for next.

DAILY_PLAN.title: Daily Plan
DAILY_PLAN.description: Lock in the day before you start. Pick the highlight, confirm tasks, schedule blocks.

DAILY_SHUTDOWN.title: Daily Shutdown
DAILY_SHUTDOWN.description: Close out the day. Capture wins, blockers, and prep tomorrow.

WEEKLY_PLAN.title: Weekly Plan
WEEKLY_PLAN.description: Set a few objectives that move goals forward this week.

WEEKLY_REVIEW.title: Weekly Review
WEEKLY_REVIEW.description: Reflect on the week. What worked, what blocked you, what to change.

QUARTERLY_REVIEW.title: Quarterly Review
QUARTERLY_REVIEW.description: Long-horizon check on goals and direction.

ANNUAL_REVIEW.title: Annual Review
ANNUAL_REVIEW.description: Year in review and intentions for the next.

dailyPlan.title: Daily Plan
dailyPlan.highlightHint: The one thing that, if done, makes today a win.
dailyPlan.noOpenTasks: No open tasks for today yet. Add one above or capture with Cmd+K.
dailyPlan.planHint: The engine will auto-schedule selected tasks into your working hours, respecting existing calendar events.

dailyShutdown.title: Daily Shutdown
dailyShutdown.hint: Close the day cleanly. Reflect, then roll over what's left.
dailyShutdown.allDone: No open tasks left for today. Clean shutdown.
dailyShutdown.rollPrompt_one: {{count}} open task still on today. Roll it to tomorrow?
dailyShutdown.rollPrompt_other: {{count}} open tasks still on today. Roll them to tomorrow?

weeklyPlan.title: Weekly Plan
weeklyPlan.checkinHint: Look at your active 1-year goals. Anything to retire? Anything newly urgent?
weeklyPlan.objectivesHint: 3–5 concrete outcomes. These become Weekly Goals you can attach tasks to.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly Review
weeklyReview.hint: Honest retrospection beats harder work. Skip prompts you can't answer.
weeklyReview.alignmentDetail: ({{aligned}} of {{total}} completed tasks linked to a goal)
weeklyReview.noCompletedTasks: No completed tasks this week yet.

periodReview.longView: . Take a breath — this is the long view.

periodLauncher.title: Periodic reviews
periodLauncher.description: Long-horizon rituals close the vision loop. Unlock near the period end so you can only complete them when it's actually time.
